case_title: FOGAL BARRY SCOTT VS JOSEPH KAPLAN, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOGAL BARRY SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOSEPH KAPLAN, INC. $2,929.00 PRINCIPAL, $29.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,958.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
TRIAL RESET TO JUN-12-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03 TRIAL OF MAY-27-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH KAPLAN, INC. VENUE IMPROPER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,008.99 FILED BY FOGAL BARRY SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH KAPLAN, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH KAPLAN, INC.
